ateccx08a_init.tooltip: Initialize SparkFun ATECCX08A crypto authentication chip

ateccx08a_sleep.tooltip: Put ATECCX08A into low-power sleep mode

ateccx08a_read_config.message0: ATECCX08A %1 read config zone byte %2 type %3
ateccx08a_read_config.tooltip: Read a byte/int/long from the ATECCX08A config zone

ateccx08a_lock_status.tooltip: Check if the specified zone is locked

ateccx08a_random.tooltip: Get a random number from ATECCX08A

ateccx08a_update_random.tooltip: Update the random seed in ATECCX08A

ateccx08a_create_key_pair.tooltip: Generate a new ECC key pair in the specified slot

ateccx08a_generate_public_key.tooltip: Generate the public key for a private key in the specified slot

ateccx08a_write_config_sparkfun.tooltip: Write the SparkFun default configuration to ATECCX08A

ateccx08a_lock_zone.tooltip: Permanently lock a config/data zone in ATECCX08A (irreversible)
